headline: 今日娱乐热点：火遮眼领跑，痴迷紧随
headlineEn: Today's Entertainment: 'Fire Shrouds Eyes' Leads, 'Obsession' Follows
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周新片达6部。火遮眼、痴迷等片热映，福尔摩斯小姐3等新片受关注。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, but 6 new films this week. 'Fire Shrouds Eyes' and 'Obsession' are trending, with 'Enola Holmes 3' and others gaining attention.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热度飙升
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' surges in popularity this week

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》引发讨论
industryHighlights.en: 'Game of Thrones Prequel: House of the Dragon' sparks discussion

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》位列本周趋势第七

industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and others upcoming
